facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 579 reviews. On a Vietnamese island famous for seafood.

Bombay Indian Restaurant Phu Quoc is doing something right. Locals, expats, and tourists keep coming back, and the ratings don't lie. Rich curries, fresh naan, and portions that actually fill you up, all at 07 Lê Lợi, Khu 1.

If you're craving something bold between beach days, this is your spot.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the naan land on the table at Bombay Indian Restaurant Phu Quoc. 579 people gave this place 4.8 stars on a seafood island. Plates piled high, sauces dark and rich. Your next dinner sorted.
